name: Low Calorie Moussaka
recipeIngredient: 1 pound lean ground beef or ground turkey
8 ounces pkg. Fat-free cream cheese, or Low Fat/cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef and onion in a skillet until brown.
2. Drain fat. Stir in eggplant cubes, tomatoes, chopped mushrooms, parsley, garlic, and seasonings.
3. Cook, uncovered for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Turn into a 12x7 inches baking dish.
5. Place eggs, cream cheese, yogurt, and salt in a blender. Cover and blend.
6. Pour over meat.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
